title: TW Method, Spel Class
description: Returns the status of the WAIT condition and WAIT timer interval.
see_also:
WaitMem

WaitSw

TW Example

VB Example:

Const PartPresent = 1

m_spel.WaitSw(PartPresent, True, 5)

If m_spel.TW() Then

  MsgBox "Part present time out occurred"

End If

C# Example:

const int PartPresent = 1;

m_spel.WaitSw(PartPresent, True, 5);

if (m_spel.TW())

  MessageBox.Show("Part present time out occurred");
examples:
Const PartPresent = 1
m_spel.WaitSw(PartPresent, True, 5)
If m_spel.TW() Then MsgBox "Part present time out occurred"
End If
